opportunities.title: 蓝色起源新格伦火箭静态点火测试爆炸，NASA 登月计划受重创
opportunities.signal_reason: 可观测事实显示运力与发射基础设施短期内受损（整箭与发射台毁损、复飞时间表未定、FAA与NASA介入关注），对Kuiper卫星发射计划与阿尔忒弥斯相关任务排期构成实质性不确定性与延迟信号。

opportunities.title: 中国首次将 9 款国产 AI 芯片纳入安可安全采购目录
opportunities.signal_reason: 可观测的市场条件变化是：新增“AI训练与推理芯片”认证品类并明确作为政府/国企采购依据，意味着合规准入门槛与采购名单被官方固化（有效期三年），将对相关厂商在政企渠道的可得性与采购流程产生直接影响。

opportunities.title: SpaceX 获 41.6 亿美元美军卫星导弹追踪合同
opportunities.signal_reason: 可观察事实为：美国太空军授予单笔41.6亿美元合同并推进Golden Dome天基追踪网络落地，表明政府采购已明确、预算规模大且将带来传感器、通信与地面处理系统的实际建设与集成需求变化。

opportunities.title: vllm-project/vllm released v0.22.0
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable capability changes include new fused-kernel/quantization support (NVFP4 fused MoE), CUDA graph support, speculative decoding, MRv2 default-selection logic for certain models, and a Rust frontend integration—features that can materially affect throughput/latency and integration options for existing vLLM users.

opportunities.title: 三星电子市值突破 1 万亿美元，韩国股指首破 7000 点  在全球 AI 硬件需求激增的强烈催化下，存储芯片板块正上演史诗级狂飙。
opportunities.signal_reason: 可观察事实包括：三星市值突破1万亿美元、股价早盘涨逾12%、经营利润同比大幅增长以及韩国综合指数大涨并创新高，显示资本市场对AI相关硬件（尤其存储芯片）需求与供给格局的预期发生了明显变化，但未给出新的产品/供给能力或成本指标等更直接的技术边界变化证据。

opportunities.title: SQLite is all you need for durable workflows
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable signal is strong community validation and active debate, plus concrete real-world usage examples (Temporal using SQLite for local installs; one commenter claiming broad internal tooling replacements on a single server), but no new release, benchmark, or capability change is evidenced beyond commentary and anecdotes.

opportunities.title: Notes from the Mistral AI Now Summit
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable signals include real on-prem deployments in European banks (e.g., BNP Paribas KYC; Abanca at ~2M customers) and strong community attention, indicating active demand for sovereign/on-prem LLM setups; however, comments also cite performance/competitiveness gaps, reducing confidence in a near-term capability shift.

opportunities.title: MCP is dead?
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable signals include a public statement from an OpenAI MCP/ChatGPT App Store lead asserting broad industry adoption (“~every company… building an MCP server”) plus strong community attention, but no concrete metrics, version changes, or official compatibility/roadmap changes are evidenced in the provided text.

opportunities.title: Liquid AI reveals 8B-A1B MoE trained on 38T
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable signals include a new model release with materially different compute profile (sparse MoE with ~1B active params) and public access via a hosted playground, but no clear evidence in the provided content of state-of-the-art performance or a step-change in cost/latency; one user report suggests weaker performance on a bug-fixing benchmark.

opportunities.title: GTA 6 Developers Unionize
opportunities.signal_reason: A credible report of union formation at a major studio is an observable shift that can affect labor relations and production practices; however, the content does not provide concrete confirmed outcomes (e.g., recognized bargaining unit, contract terms, or immediate operational changes).

opportunities.title: 华为发表“韬定律”：以时间缩微替代几何缩微，探索半导体新路径  近日在上海举行的 2026 国际电路与系统研讨会上，华为发表“韬定律”，提出以“时间缩微”替代“
opportunities.signal_reason: 可观察事实层面包含：公开场合发布新技术路线表述、宣称已量产381款芯片及计划在今年秋季发布新手机SoC；但缺少可核验的技术指标、工艺/成本/性能数据与第三方确认，短期对市场条件的确定性改变有限。

opportunities.title: We should be more tired than the model
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable signal is mainly validated interest and active debate (high HN engagement) around agentic coding workflow pain points; the item does not report a concrete new capability release, pricing/access shift, or measured performance change in tools or markets.

opportunities.title: The dead economy theory
opportunities.signal_reason: The item is commentary and speculation rather than an observable change in capability, pricing, access, or regulation; the main concrete signal is strong community attention (high votes/comments), which indicates interest but not a market/technical condition shift.

opportunities.title: Bijou64: A variable-length integer encoding
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable signal is primarily informational (a new encoding proposal and discussion) without clear evidence in the provided content of broad adoption, standardized integration, or demonstrated step-change in cost/latency/reliability for a defined user group.

opportunities.title: Is AI causing a repeat of frontend’s lost decade?
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable signal is mainly sentiment and discourse (no concrete new capability, pricing/access change, or released technology), though the large community engagement indicates attention to workflow/skill shifts.

opportunities.title: On Rendering Diffs
opportunities.signal_reason: Evidence of ongoing user pain (e.g., 3-way diffs still poorly served; complaints about GitHub UX) and meaningful engagement, but no concrete new capability, release, pricing/access change, or market-structure shift is reported in the content itself.

opportunities.title: You can just say it
opportunities.signal_reason: No new technology, release, pricing, access change, or measurable capability shift is described—it's mainly a norms/behavior discussion despite high community attention.
